faq.title: Board Intelligence FAQ
faq.whatIsBoardAnswer: Board-ready intelligence transforming operational and strategic data into governance insights for leadership, boards, and investors.
faq.governanceSupport: How does Aipify support executive governance?
faq.governanceSupportAnswer: Through decision registers, governance health assessments, meeting summaries, and audit trails integrated with Action Center and Early Warning systems.
faq.replaceDecisionsAnswer: No. Aipify prepares intelligence and documentation. Human leadership and boards retain decision authority.
faq.investorInsightsAnswer: From execution outcomes, portfolio health, and governance patterns — always as illustrative indicators, not audited financials.
faq.confidenceScores: How should leaders interpret confidence scores?

faq.title: Transformation & Change FAQ
faq.whatIsTransformationAnswer: Strategic change initiatives including digital transformation, restructuring, process change, and cultural evolution — supported by readiness and adoption intelligence.
faq.whyFailAnswer: Often due to underestimated human complexity, poor communication, insufficient readiness, and lack of executive sponsorship — areas Aipify helps leaders monitor.
faq.howSupport: How does Aipify support change initiatives?
faq.howSupportAnswer: Through readiness assessments, adoption tracking, resistance support, stakeholder mapping, and briefings integrated with Decision Cockpit, Portfolio, and Early Warning.
faq.autoManageAnswer: No. Aipify prepares intelligence and recommendations. Leaders and teams drive change — people remain at the center.
faq.respondResistance: How should leaders respond to resistance?
faq.respondResistanceAnswer: With supportive engagement — address concerns, remove blockers, improve communication, and provide enablement. Signals are never punitive.
faq.readinessAssessmentsAnswer: From leadership alignment, communication effectiveness, resource availability, training readiness, and governance patterns — as governance indicators, not surveillance.

salesExpertEngine.faqIntroBody: Clear answers about operating as an independent Aipify Sales Expert — commissions, customers, the portal, email practices, certifications, and professional expectations.
salesExpertEngine.faqVisionClosing: The Aipify Sales Expert Program exists to create opportunities for people who believe in helping organizations work smarter and more sustainably. Sales Experts should feel equipped, respected, and supported — and organizations should feel confident working with them.

whatIsSalesExpert.q: What is an Aipify Sales Expert?
whatIsSalesExpert.a: An Aipify Sales Expert is an independent professional or business that helps organizations discover, adopt, and succeed with Aipify. Sales Experts represent Aipify professionally while operating their own businesses.

employedByAipify.a: No. Sales Experts operate independently and are responsible for managing their own businesses. You are not an employee of Aipify.

ownCompany.q: Can I have my own company while being an Aipify Sales Expert?
ownCompany.a: Yes. Many Sales Experts operate as sole proprietorships, limited companies, consulting businesses, or agencies.

howCommissionsWork.a: Sales Experts receive recurring commissions when organizations subscribe to Aipify through their Sales Expert links. Commission structures are determined by the Aipify Partner Program.

recurringWhileSubscribed.q: Do I continue receiving commissions if the customer remains subscribed?
recurringWhileSubscribed.a: Yes. Recurring commissions continue while the customer maintains an active subscription and the Sales Expert remains in good standing.

customerCancels.q: What happens if the customer cancels their subscription?
customerCancels.a: Recurring commissions associated with that subscription cease.

howCommissionsPaid.a: Commissions are distributed through approved payout systems such as Stripe Connect.

whenCommissionsPaid.a: Payment schedules are determined by the Partner Program and may vary by country and compliance requirements.

chargeForSetup.q: Can I charge customers for setup and onboarding?
chargeForSetup.a: Yes. Sales Experts may independently invoice customers for setup, training, Knowledge Center creation, operational consulting, and additional implementation services.

aipifySetsPrices.a: No. You operate independently and determine your own pricing. Aipify may provide suggested pricing guidance.

pricingGuidance.q: What pricing guidance does Aipify recommend?
pricingGuidance.a: Example guidance: Setup 15 000 NOK, Training 5 000 NOK. Example total package: 20 000 NOK. Actual pricing remains your responsibility.

customerRelationship.a: Customers remain Aipify customers regarding subscriptions. Sales Experts maintain independent consulting relationships with those customers.

moveCustomers.q: Can I move Aipify customers to another platform?
moveCustomers.a: No. Subscriptions remain directly between Aipify and the customer.

chooseAnotherExpert.q: Can customers choose another Sales Expert?
chooseAnotherExpert.a: Yes. Organizations maintain freedom regarding consulting relationships.

whatIsPortal.q: What is the Sales Expert Portal?
whatIsPortal.a: The Sales Expert Portal provides tools to help Sales Experts operate successfully — customer management, revenue visibility, training resources, opportunity tracking, email templates, and certification progress.

seeAllCustomers.q: Can I see all Aipify customers?
seeAllCustomers.a: No. You may only access information related to customers connected to your Sales Expert account.

emailTemplates.a: Yes. The Sales Expert Portal includes professionally written email templates designed to support ethical sales practices.

customizeTemplates.a: Yes. Templates should reflect your own communication style while remaining professional.

autoInsertInfo.q: Will my information automatically appear within templates?
autoInsertInfo.a: Yes. Examples include your name, company information, booking links, and Sales Expert links.

bulkEmail.q: Can I send bulk email campaigns?
bulkEmail.a: No. The Sales Expert Email Center supports thoughtful one-to-one communication and structured follow-ups. Mass unsolicited outreach is not aligned with Aipify values.

rememberFollowUps.q: Does Aipify help me remember follow-ups?
rememberFollowUps.a: Yes. Suggested follow-up schedules may include 14-day check-ins, 30-day reviews, and 90-day value discussions.

automaticFollowUps.a: Follow-up recommendations may be automated. The decision to contact customers remains yours.

needCertification.a: Certain Sales Expert capabilities may require certification. Certification demonstrates competence and builds customer trust.

becomeSpecialized.q: Can I become more specialized over time?
becomeSpecialized.a: Yes. Future pathways may include executive, commerce, support, and industry-specific specializations.

portalLanguages.q: Is the Sales Expert Portal available in multiple languages?
portalLanguages.a: Yes. Initial language priorities include English, Norwegian, Swedish, and Danish. Additional languages may be introduced over time.

whatAipifyExpects.q: What does Aipify expect from Sales Experts?
whatAipifyExpects.a: Sales Experts should operate honestly, prioritize customer success, represent Aipify professionally, continue learning, and respect customer autonomy.

unacceptableBehavior.a: Examples include misleading sales practices, misrepresenting Aipify capabilities, spam campaigns, harassment, and violations of applicable laws.

whySelfLove.q: Why does Aipify encourage Self Love?
whySelfLove.a: Sales can be demanding. Aipify encourages sustainable growth, healthy work habits, and celebrating progress without sacrificing wellbeing. Success should be meaningful and maintainable.

buildRealBusiness.q: Can I build a real business around Aipify?
buildRealBusiness.a: Yes. Sales Experts may generate income through recurring commissions, setup services, training services, consulting engagements, and specialized expertise. Many individuals may choose to build full-time careers around helping organizations succeed with Aipify.
